docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARLTON BRENDAN AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLTON BRENDAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $122.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $872.50, THIS CASE IS RELATED TO SC # 748530: CARLTON VS CLEICH. ALTHOUGH FILE INDICATES THAT AVIS APPEARED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR
